CVE-2024-48425.summary: A segmentation fault (SEGV) was detected in the Assimp::SplitLargeMeshesProcess_Triangle::UpdateNode function within the Assimp library during fuzz testing using AddressSanitizer. CVE-2025-2151.summary: A vulnerability classified as critical was found in Open Asset Import Library Assimp 5.4.3. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

It is recommended to apply a patch to fix this issue.
